description: Offline fixtures for the direct formatted translation pipeline. The PowerShell harness builds Minecraft Components directly and checks reversible <st-doc>/<line>/<run> restore behavior.

fixtures.name: Ring Amulet Slot keeps cyan bold styled token
Start Game sign keeps four line slots and green click line
Scoreboard cache key is isolated from tooltip cache
System chat abbreviations heading and footer are translated
Repeated Loaded status terms translate consistently
Fullwidth avSYS status text is detected and normalized
